mapper.select:
SELECT T1.LOAN_ID ,T2.MEMBER_ID ,T2.NAME ,T3.TITLE ,T1.LOAN_DATE ,T1.DUE_DATE ,T1.RETURN_DATE ,T1.STATUS ,T1.BOOK_ID ,0 AS CHK FROM LIBRARYDB.LOANS T1 INNER JOIN LIBRARYDB.MEMBERS T2 ON T1.MEMBER_ID = T2.MEMBER_ID INNER JOIN LIBRARYDB.BOOKS T3 ON T1.BOOK_ID = T3.BOOK_ID WHERE 1=1
AND T1.LOAN_ID = #{LOAN_ID}
AND (NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') OR TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') OR STATUS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') )
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
AND STATUS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
SELECT MEMBER_ID , NAME , BIRTHDATE FROM LIBRARYDB.MEMBERS
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LIBRARYDB.MEMBERS (NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, BIRTHDATE) VALUES (#{NAME}, #{EMAIL}, #{PHONE}, #{BIRTHDATE})
INSERT INTO LIBRARYDB.LOANS (MEMBER_ID, BOOK_ID, LOAN_DATE, DUE_DATE) VALUES (#{MEMBER_ID}, #{BOOK_ID}, current_timestamp(), DATE_ADD(current_timestamp(), interval 14 DAY))
